creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
===>  Building for ImageMagick-6.7.2.10
/bin/sh ./config/mkinstalldirs . ltdl/
cp ./ltdl/argz_.h ltdl/argz.h-t
mv ltdl/argz.h-t ltdl/argz.h
gmake  all-am
